change: Expanded conflict extraction with hit-location patterns, weapon/technology taxonomy, identity signal parsing, and official announcement type classification.
Added stale agent-run reconciliation endpoint and runbook workflow for historical running-state cleanup.
Added functional smoke script for RSS ingest -> conflict ingest -> review queue -> stats verification.
Documented operational bootstrap workflow and Supabase REST compatibility for RSS/article/conflict pipelines.
Added in-app wiki route, docs hub, API reference, and OpenAPI endpoint for conflict ops.
Added admin Conflict Ops page with autonomy trends, source approvals, and review queue actions.
Added guarded autonomy cycle with scout/ingestion/verification/theory/forecast/reliability agents.
Added wiki index page and discoverability links in footer and expanded menu.
Published AI Checker wiki page with route/API workflow and safety notes.
Published Markets wiki page with instrument data flow and endpoint references.
Published Agent API wiki page documenting /api/v1 contract and auth model.
Added shared wiki status/version banner powered by feature flags.
Added configurable docs issue reporting via REACT_APP_DOCS_ISSUE_URL.
